languages.text: "Причина запроса: вмешательство жизнеформы "Джейс Мартинакс" в процесс извлечения аугментов из утратившего валидность носителя. Мотивация жизнеформы неизвестна".

traits.locale_text: "Причина запроса: вмешательство единицы "Джейс Мартинакс" в процесс извлечения аугментов из утратившего валидность носителя. Мотивация единицы: неизвестна".

languages.text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."
languages.original_text: "Причина запроса: вмешательство жизнеформы "Джейс Мартинакс" в процесс извлечения аугментов из утратившего валидность носителя. Мотивация жизнеформы неизвестна".

traits.locale_text: "Reason for request: the interference of unit Jaze Martinax in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The unit's motivation is unknown."
"Reason for request: the interference of unit Jaze Martinax in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The unit's motivation is unknown."
"Reason for request: the interference of unit Jaze Martinax in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The unit's motivation is unknown."

languages.text: 「依頼理由：サービス価値を失った輸送機から増幅器を回収する過程で、ジャゼ・マーティナクスが妨害を行った。そのユニットの動機は不明である」
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of unit Jaze Martinax in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The unit's motivation is unknown."

languages.text: "Talep nedeni: Jaze Martinax yaşam formunun, hizmet değerini yitirmiş bir taşıyıcıdan ogmentleri geri alma sürecine müdahalesi. Yaşam formunun motivasyonu bilinmiyor."
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Talep nedeni: Jaze Martinax yaşam formunun, hizmet değerini yitirmiş bir taşıyıcıdan ogmentleri geri alma sürecine müdahalesi. Yaşam formunun motivasyonu bilinmiyor."

languages.text: “请求理由：杰兹·马丁纳克斯生命体强行干预从已丧失服役价值的载体中回收植入物的流程。该生命体动机不明。”
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."

traits.locale_text: “请求理由：杰兹·马丁纳克斯生命体强行干预从已丧失服役价值的载体中回收植入物的流程。该生命体动机不明。”

languages.text: "Grund für Anfrage: Eingriff der Lebensform Jaze Martinax in den Prozess der Wiedergewinnung von Augmentationen aus einem Träger, der seinen Dienstwert verloren hat. Motivation der Lebensform ist unbekannt."
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Grund für Anfrage: Eingriff der Lebensform Jaze Martinax in den Prozess der Wiedergewinnung von Augmentationen aus einem Träger, der seinen Dienstwert verloren hat. Motivation der Lebensform ist unbekannt."

languages.text: « Motif de la demande : ingérence inopportune de l'entité Jaze Martinax dans le processus d'extraction des augmentations implantées dans un hôte ayant perdu toute capacité à se rendre utile. Les raisons d'un tel comportement demeurent inconnues. »
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."

traits.locale_text: « Motif de la demande : ingérence inopportune de l'entité Jaze Martinax dans le processus d'extraction des augmentations implantées dans un hôte ayant perdu toute capacité à se rendre utile. Les raisons d'un tel comportement demeurent inconnues. »

languages.text: «Motivo de la solicitud: la interferencia de la forma de vida Jaze Martinax en el proceso de recuperar los aumentos de un portador cuyo servicio ha perdido todo valor. El motivo de la forma de vida me es desconocido».
languages.original_text: "Reason for request: the interference of the Jaze Martinax life form in the process of retrieving augments from a carrier that has lost its service value. The life form's motivation is unknown."

traits.locale_text: «Motivo de la solicitud: la interferencia de la forma de vida Jaze Martinax en el proceso de recuperar los aumentos de un portador cuyo servicio ha perdido todo valor. El motivo de la forma de vida me es desconocido».
